name: Shubham Sharan
siteTitle: Shubham Sharan - Senior AI Product Manager
metaDescription: Product leader with 12+ years building products from scratch. EdTech, B2B, HR tech & AI marketplaces. 100K+ users across 60+ countries. Senior AI PM at Huzzle.
eyebrow: Senior AI Product Manager · Ex-Founder · 12+ Years of Experience
heroParagraphs: I have spent the last 12 years building products - as a founder, head of product, and now as a Senior AI Product Manager at Huzzle. Across edtech, B2B services, and AI marketplaces, I have built products from the ground up: from the first user conversation to the first version of the product and the first dollar of revenue.
That's the lens I bring to everything: products are made of decisions, and better decisions come from having sat on all sides of the table.

about.title: Engineer turned founder turned product leader
about.intro: Right now I'm a senior AI PM at Huzzle, building AI matching for a two-sided talent marketplace. I got here through a longer route than most - and every stop taught a different lesson.

chapters.lesson: Where I learned how software actually gets built.
Five and a half years of make-payroll-or-don't reality - how businesses actually work.
Three years scaling an edtech product across markets I'd never visited.
Learning how AI changes the shape of a talent marketplace.

about.conviction: Products are made of decisions, and the quality of the decisions depends on what you've actually seen.
about.outro: Frameworks help. Vocabulary helps. But the work that compounds is the work of paying close attention - to users, to data, to the gap between what you think the product is and what it actually is. That's what I try to bring to every product, and what I try to write about when I'm not building one.

cta.title: From Founder Chaos to Product Clarity.
cta.subtitle: I bring entrepreneurial thinking, data-driven decisions, and relentless execution to growing product teams.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Whether it's a product role, a collaboration, or just a conversation about building things - I'd love to hear from you.

heroPoints: Every seat at the table - founder, head of product, senior AI product manager
0 → 1 specialist - first user call, first product, first revenue
Products are made of decisions - experience makes those decisions better
